instruction: Rewrite the content to meet insurance regulatory and compliance standards.

input.draft_text:
Know why financial planning is incomplete without insurance
Efficient financial planning is crucial for a successful financial journey. Though you make a lot of plans for our future, you cannot predict life. Life is uncertain. Hence, it is important to avail life protection before you start the financial planning process. Life insurance ensures immediate financial protection for your family in an unfortunate situation.
In India, no one prefers to discuss unforeseen situations like the untimely death of an earning person in the family and the financial instability that it can cause. As per the Economic survey by the Ministry of Finance, there are only 3 out of 100 people have a life insurance policy in India1. Understanding the risk and availing the life protection before even starting the financial planning journey is extremely important for healthy financial life.
What is financial planning?
Financial planning is the process of taking a look at the complete picture of your financial situation, drawing a clear plan for future goals, and reviewing and monitoring your progress towards financial freedom. Financial planning involves various areas such as planning, budgeting, saving, investing, tax planning, retirement planning, insurance, estate planning, and more.
How to do financial planning successfully?
Holistic financial planning takes all aspects into consideration, both current financial situations and future aspirations in life. Here are a few important steps to do financial planning successfully.
Define your goals:Identifying your future goals is the first step to successful financial planning. Once you know what you dream to achieve, you can define them in terms of time horizon and the target amount. For example, if you think of building a dream home in the next 10 years, it becomes your long-term goal. You need to understand how much money you would need to build that home. Then, accordingly, you can plan for achieving those goals. You need to categorize your goals as short-term, medium-term, and long-term goals. Once you categorize, prioritize them in order.
Know your current position:Once you know your goal, you can start crafting a plan only after understanding the current financial position. Create your monthly budget and then understand how much you can save for your future. Explore the investment plans available in the market to make rational choices.
Develop a solid plan:Developing a solid plan to achieve your goal works like a roadmap. As there are many financial products available in the market, choosing the right products or the right combination of product help you achieve your goal within the time frame. Before you develop an investment plan, it is extremely important to ensure you have adequate life insurance coverage for your family to avail of instant financial support during an unforeseen event.
Implement and monitor your financial plan:Do the investments as per your financial plan. Financial planning is not just about doing the right investments. Along with implementation, it is also important to monitor the progress of your financial planning to achieve financial freedom.
Keeping the uncertainty in the mind, it is important to be well prepared for any unexpected challenges that may come your way. Bajaj Allianz eTouch term insurance plan is designed to provide a financial shield against such unexpected challenges.
Reasons why you should consider Bajaj Allianz eTouch term insurance plan2?
Bajaj Allianz eTouch is a pure-term insurance plan available for online purchase with higher coverage options. The policy comes in many variants and each with unique features.
Life shield plan:This term plan offers complete protection to you and your family against various uncertainties such as untimely demise, terminal illness, and disability. The policy offers flexibility to pay premiums throughout the policy period or for a limited period. The payout can be availed in lumpsum or on a monthly basis or a combination of both.
Life shield plus:This term plan offers complete life protection against death, terminal illness, and disability along with many unique features like a premium holiday option, payment flexibility, early exit value, etc. Anyone between 18 to 65 years of age can avail of this policy. Along with the accidental death benefit, you can even opt for the payout option (lumpsum/monthly/combination of both) at your convenience.
Life shield ROP:This variant offers complete protection and a financial shield against death, disability, and terminal illness. The policy offers a waiver of the premium option in case of disability or terminal illness. Along with flexible payment options, there is an option of a premium holiday also. You can opt for a return of premium on maturity too.
Higher coverage, unique features, the convenience of online purchase along with the higher claim settlement ratio makes the Bajaj Allianz eTouch term insurance plan worth buying.
Life insurance coverage is a critical piece of your financial planning process. Though it is important to build a significant corpus for your future goals, financial protection in the form of term insurance coverage is equally important.
Disclaimer:
The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read the sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale. Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance Company Ltd., Regd. office Address: Bajaj Allianz House, Airport Road, Yerawada, Pune - 411006, Reg. No.: 116, CIN: U66010PN2001PLC015959, Call us on toll free No.: 1800 209 7272, Mail us: customercare@bajajallianz.co.in, Fax No: 02066026789
Only 3 Out Of 100 People In India Have Life Insurance Policy: Economic Survey
eTouch Term Insurance Plan | Bajaj Allianz Life
